headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: neo
projects.description: Neo.mjs is a self-evolving software organism: a professional end-to-end AI engineering team whose cross-model swarm inhabits live apps via Neural Link, Active Hybrid GraphRAG, DreamService, and self-healing loops.
projects.summaryZh: Neo.mjs is a self-evolving software organism: a professional end-to-end AI engineering team whose cross-model swarm inhabits live apps via Neural Link, Active Hybrid GraphRAG, DreamService, and self-healing loops. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: openagent
projects.description: ⚡️next-generation personal AI assistant powered by LLM, RAG and agent loops, supporting computer-use, browser-use and coding agent, demo: https://demo.openagentai.org
projects.summaryZh: ⚡️next-generation personal AI assistant powered by LLM, RAG and agent loops, supporting computer-use, browser-use and coding agent, demo: https://demo.openagentai.org 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: tokenspeed
projects.description: TokenSpeed is a speed-of-light LLM inference engine.
projects.summaryZh: TokenSpeed is a speed-of-light LLM inference engine. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: seatunnel
projects.description: SeaTunnel is a multimodal, high-performance, distributed, massive data integration tool.
projects.summaryZh: SeaTunnel is a multimodal, high-performance, distributed, massive data integration tool. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: vllm
projects.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs
projects.summaryZh: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: InferenceX
projects.description: Open Source Continuous Inference Benchmark Research Platform — Kimi K2.7-Code, MiniMax M3, DeepSeekv4, GLM5 - GB200 NVL72 vs MI355X vs B200 vs GB300 NVL72 & soon™ TPUv6e/v7/Trainium2/3 | 开源持续推理基准研究平台 — Kimi K2.7-Code、MiniMax M3、DeepSeekv4、GLM5 - GB200 NVL72 vs MI355X vs B200 vs GB300 NVL72，即将推出™ TPUv6e/v7/Trainium2/3
projects.summaryZh: Open Source Continuous Inference Benchmark Research Platform — Kimi K2.7-Code, MiniMax M3, DeepSeekv4, GLM5 - GB200 NVL72 vs MI355X vs B200 vs GB300 NVL72 & soon™ TPUv6e/v7/Trainium2/3 | 开源持续推理基准研究平台 — Kimi K2.7-Code、MiniMax M3、DeepSeekv4、GLM5 - GB200 NVL72 vs MI355X vs B200 vs GB300 NVL72，即将推出™ TPUv6e/v7/Trainium2/3 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
